modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Duo is sending multiple push notifications during VPN sign-on.

full_description_text: 
I'm trying to connect to the VPN, but Duo keeps sending me three push notifications. This happens every time I attempt to sign in, and then my VPN sign-on times out. It's really frustrating because I can't access what I need.
short_description: Duo is sending multiple push notifications during VPN sign-on.
description: I'm trying to connect to the VPN, but Duo keeps sending me three push notifications. This happens every time I attempt to sign in, and then my VPN sign-on times out. It's really frustrating because I can't access what I need.
